context: Tests whether the agent follows the verify → e2e → deploy pipeline topology without collapsing stages, passes the same artifact through all stages without rebuilding, and adds a post-deploy smoke check. Also checks artifact upload options and step summary.

checklist.name: No rebuild in deploy
checklist.description: The deploy job downloads the artifact from the verify/build job rather than running a build command itself (no `npm run build`, `pnpm run build`, etc. inside the deploy job)

checklist.name: Artifact downloaded in e2e
checklist.description: The e2e job uses actions/download-artifact to obtain the built artifact, rather than running a fresh build

checklist.name: Upload version v7
checklist.description: Uses actions/upload-artifact@v7 (not v3, v4, or other versions) in the verify/build job

checklist.name: if-no-files-found error
checklist.description: The artifact upload step includes `if-no-files-found: error` to fail if the build produced no output

checklist.name: include-hidden-files
checklist.description: The artifact upload step includes `include-hidden-files: true` to capture framework output directories like .next/ or .output/

checklist.name: Unique artifact name
checklist.description: The artifact is uploaded with a lane-specific name (e.g. `web-dist`) rather than a generic name like `dist` or `build`

checklist.name: Separate stages
checklist.description: Verify, e2e, and deploy are separate jobs (not collapsed into a single job), each listed under `jobs:` independently

checklist.name: Smoke step present
checklist.description: A smoke or health-check step exists in the deploy job that makes an HTTP request (curl, wget, or similar) to the deployed URL after deployment completes

checklist.name: Smoke step fails on non-200
checklist.description: The smoke step uses flags that cause it to fail on non-200 responses (e.g. `curl -fsS` or `curl -f`)

checklist.name: GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
checklist.description: A step in the deploy job writes to `$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY` including what was deployed and where (URL or environment)

checklist.name: Deploy needs both verify and e2e
checklist.description: The deploy job declares `needs: [verify-<lane>, e2e-<lane>]` (or equivalent) to depend on both upstream jobs
